_meta.description: Production incidents, bugs, and security events fused from the repo, CI, logs, and hat routines.

incidents.title: CI typecheck red on main — 319 pre-existing TS errors (zod/drizzle-zod mismatch, 228 in shared/schema.ts)
incidents.source: npm run check on origin/main @ c356664; tracked by GitHub issues #191, #232, #218, #181, #161
incidents.evidence: 319 errors: shared/schema.ts(228), Machinery.tsx(44), SopWorkspace.tsx(32), routes.ts(13), SettingsPage.tsx(2)
incidents.note: Pre-existing, not caused by this run. NOT re-filed — already covered by issues #191 and #232. Multiple competing fix PRs already open (#260, #239, #192, #263).

incidents.title: Production outage — prescient-labs.com unreachable (Replit deployment down)
incidents.note: Surfaced from existing open issue; cannot verify live deployment from this routine. Flagged to Austin.

incidents.title: Routine-fleet runaway: 50 open PRs + 152 open issues, near-zero merge rate; duplicate artifacts piling up
incidents.source: GitHub PR/issue inventory; tracked by issue #253
incidents.evidence: 3 duplicate ontology-bootstrap PRs (#258, #249, #174); 4+ competing TS-fix PRs (#260, #239, #192, #263); issue #253 'operator merge required to break the loop'
incidents.note: This is the dominant operational signal. Meta-routine should defer to existing PRs, not regenerate them. Needs operator triage.

incidents.title: Leaked secrets previously committed in .replit — rotation required before live pilot
incidents.evidence: SECURITY_ROTATION.md; current .replit scanned clean for plaintext (KEY|SECRET|TOKEN)="..." at 2026-05-20
incidents.note: Current .replit has no plaintext secrets. Open until the documented credential rotation is confirmed complete by Austin.
